name: Healthcare & Life Sciences (DACH)
description: Hospitals, health insurance providers (Krankenkassen), pharmaceutical companies, and medical device manufacturers requiring KRITIS-compliant, GDPR-strict cloud infrastructure for patient data, clinical workloads, and digital health platforms.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CIO, IT Director, Chief Medical Information Officer, Head of Digital Health
drivers: Health Hybrid Cloud demand for mixed-sensitivity workloads

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on healthcare IT spend in DACH and KHZG-driven acceleration

tam.description: Total healthcare IT spend in DACH region (~EUR 8B)

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure, hosting, and managed services for healthcare workloads

som.description: Capturable share through Health Hybrid Cloud offering and Telekom healthcare ecosystem

competitive_landscape: SAP Health, IBM/Kyndryl, Oracle Health, Cerner, CGM (CompuGroup Medical), regional IT providers
